item.title: White House Unveils 'Seated Meal Security Act' to Combat National Lunch Crisis
item.description: Two-hour lunches deemed 'visionary' as new plate tariffs boost productivity by 11%.

item.title: Cable Chaos: Tax Time Turns Into Municipal Lottery for Jack Post Access
item.description: New IRS compliance regulation mandates color-coded cables paired with lucky lottery slots, turning tax filing into a thrilling game of chance.

item.title: Fort Lee Commuters Spot 'Palm Trees' and 'Red Carpet Rumors' in Unlikely Hollywood Spy Saga
item.description: PATH Train Riders Debate Validity of California Studio Allegations as Fare Hikes Loom Large

item.title: Great Transcontinental Caravan Tax Leaves Families in Bureaucratic Gridlock
item.description: As car trips become odysseys, the government taxes road warriors for their love of the open road.

item.title: National Institute of Queue Etiquette Bows Out: Permits Now Void, Manuals Never Used
item.description: Last Paperwork Shuffle as Country Scrambles to Understand What It Meant to Wait.

item.title: National Schedule Collapse Amenities Review Board Rates 'When Full' Evacuation Shuttles — Sandwich Hydration Noted
item.description: Amid coordination failures, new federal guidelines elevate sandwich storage while transportation options dwindle.

item.title: New 'Jingle Calibration' Inspections Threaten Soup Trade as Summer Steams Ahead
item.description: Federal mandates put pressure on broth vendors as tariff disputes simmer — and everyone questions where the flavor went.

item.title: Helium Hopes: New Initiative Turns Oil Crisis into Backyard Swing Set Crisis
item.description: As the nation runs low on buoyant gas, HOA regulations double down on zoned airspace.

item.title: Crunchy Conspiracy Spreads as Local Residents Report 'Unidentified Matter' in Milk
item.description: Cereal prototypes signal potential HOA violations, leaving Silver Spring on the brink of breakfast chaos.

item.title: Ethernet Traffic Jam: Commuters Now Booking Time Slots to Plug In
item.description: Municipal jack posts become the hottest ticket in town, turning coffee runs into cable-stress marathons.
